CE1.justification: Acted directly from the preamble + user message with no clarifying questions and no demand on the user to recall or re-state anything.

CE2.justification: One-sentence final response that names destinations, the pattern count, and the deferred quantification — no preamble, no restatement, no closing fluff.

CE3.justification: Says destination and why in-band ('Logged it as a pattern in observations.md ... added a followups.md item to pin down the actual lag numbers ... before acting') — user can intercept either route cheaply.

CE4.justification: Each file (observations.md, followups.md, daybook entry, scaffold files) was written as a discrete clean artifact with no in-progress markers; interrupting mid-flow would leave no orphans.
